description:
You are an art and geography teacher at an OLPC-equipped elementary school. You are creating a 'Flags of the World' programming unit in TurtleBlocks. Your task is to build a TurtleBlocks (TurtleArt) program that draws the flag of Japan — a red filled circle centered on the canvas.

Open the TurtleBlocks activity. Construct a program starting with a 'start' block. Use 'penup' to lift the pen, position the turtle using blocks like 'setxy' or 'forward'/'right' so the circle will be centered, and use 'pendown' to lower the pen. Set the pen color to red using the 'setcolor' block with value 0. Begin a filled region with the 'fill' (or 'startfill') block. Draw a full circle using the 'arc' block with an angle of 360 and a radius between 50 and 200. End the filled region with the 'endfill' (or 'stopfill') block. The program must have all these blocks connected.

Save the program as '/home/ga/Documents/japan_flag.ta' via the activity's save/export menu.
